untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific indicators and mechanics (calendar spreads, strike prices, option expiration, out-of-the-money spreads) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The backtest engine provided supports only price action and technical indicators on underlying assets, not options Greeks, implied volatility, strike selection, or spread construction. Additionally, 'stock is midway between two striking prices' requires knowledge of specific strike prices which cannot be derived from the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_147 is an advanced options strategy combining bullish and bearish calendar spreads. This requires: (1) options pricing/Greeks data unavailable in indicator list, (2) strike price selection logic not supported, (3) near-term vs longer-term option leg differentiation not possible, (4) option expiration mechanics outside backtest scope. Recommend implementing this signal in a dedicated options backtesting platform with volatility surface and Greeks calculations.
